title: dasyphyllum latifolium
intro: Dasyphyllum latifolium, also known as 'Chucao' or 'Tree Bush', is a small, shrub-like plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dasyphyllum latifolium are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
